title: Knowledge Persistence Architectures for AI-Based Coding Agents: Replication Package
description: Replication package for a systematic literature review (PRISMA 2020) on knowledge persistence architectures for AI-based coding agents. Contains the protocol, final search strategy, saved arXiv and Scopus exports, Semantic Scholar citation-chasing records, deduplication ledger, screening decisions, structured extraction data for 95 included records, synthesis tables, validation scripts, and PRISMA flow source.

creators.name: Zatti, Alexandre
creators.affiliation: Programa de Pos-Graduacao em Computacao Aplicada, Universidade Federal da Fronteira Sul
